scripts.build: npm --workspace @minicode/shared run build && npm --workspace @minicode/agent-sidecar run build && npm --workspace minicode-assistant run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @minicode/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @minicode/agent-sidecar run typecheck && npm --workspace minicode-assistant run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @minicode/shared run lint && npm --workspace @minicode/agent-sidecar run lint && npm --workspace minicode-assistant run lint
scripts.check: npm run validate:features && npm run check:agents-index && npm run typecheck
